title: User who mysteriously becomes Admin
excerpt:
Hi! 
How is it possible in the sub-element to find this User as Admin with crown when in the Main Panel he is a simple User?

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
How is it possible in the sub-element to find this User as Admin with crown when in the Main Panel he is a simple User?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @AleRun

The blue crown indicates that the user is a board owner, not an admin per definition.

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
basdebruin:

The blue crown indicates that the user is a board owner, not an admin per definition.

The user in question (Leonardo) is not the owner of the board. Here are the ownership and sharing settings…
